name: Halloween Snack Mix
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup blanched almonds or gum drops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the red hots, blanched almonds or gum drops, sunflower seeds, candy corn, M & M's, corn chips, raisins, cheese curls, Triscuits or Golden Grahams, and peanuts.
2. Serve with several pints of cherry punch.
